characters.name: 'Enry the Robot
characters.description: 'Enry the Robotwas a minor, robotic character from the originalSooty Show. He mainly comunicates by making mechanically buzzing noises and bobbing his head up and down. He also has flashing lights where his eyes are.

characters.name: Butch
characters.description: Butchis a brown bulldog who made a few appearances inThe Sooty Show. He then made a couple of appearances inSooty & Co.InSooty Heightshe appeared in two episodes, once as a guard dog and secondly as a pantomime. In the series entitledSooty, Butch became a main character and appeared in almost every episode, but with a few slight redesigns to look more like a bulldog with his mouth being reskined to yellow, 2 large bucked teeth and a patch in the right eye in Series 1, in Series 2 and 3 he was redesigned again with patch for his right eye being removed and his bucks of teeth became smaller. He then appeared inThe Big Day Outfeature-length special as a judge in a talent contest. Butch is the main 'baddie'. In the Sooty & Co. series he was an evil pirate inMatthew's dream and in The Sooty Show he appeared as a rival to Superdog (Sweep). InThe Dance Competition, Butch was one of the judges. According to the official website's message board, after theSootytelevision series ended, Butch went to live in Guiseley withMatthew Corbettbut has expressed a wish to appear in the new television series.

characters.name: Captain Fogbound
characters.description: Captain Fogbound and his balloon Captain Fogboundis a cat inSooty's Amazing Adventureswho pilots a hot air balloon. He is courtingKatarina. He is often called plain 'Captain' or occasionally 'Captain F' by Katarina. He has a stereotypical RAF pilot voice.

characters.name: Connie Creighton
characters.description: Connie with Matthew Corbett Connie Creighton(Born 20th December 1934 in Ilkley, West Yorkshire - Died 21st January 2009 in Bournemouth) was a regular guest-star on the series. Connie Creighton was born in Ilkley, West Yorkshire. She was a friend of the Corbett family and used to co-present the stage-shows in the 1990's with Matthew Corbett. She has made numerous guest appearances on the shows. She died peacefully on 21st January 2009 in her Bournemouth home after a battle with dementia, aged 74. A tribute show was held which featured Matthew Corbett in March 2009. She was married toSooty & Co.puppeteerJohn Seaton.

characters.description: Cousin McScampiisScampi's Scottish cousin. He enjoys playing the bagpipes. Depending on what side of the family he is on, he may also be Sooty's cousin, but this is not confirmed.

characters.name: Dotty
characters.description: Dotty in Season 1. Dottywas a recurring character inSooty Heightswho owned a hotel near Sooty Heights, she is very friendly and has no rivalry with Sooty's hotel.  She was played byBrenda Longman. After Sooty Heights ended, she isn't mentioned again.

characters.name: Father Christmas
characters.description: Father Christmas, orSanta Claus, has appeared in various episodes over the years. He appears in the second series ofSootyin the episodePranks and Presentswhere he enlists the help of Sooty to create some Sooty toys for Christmas. As a reward for their kind actions, Father Christmas gives Sooty, Sweep, Soo and Richard a present each. Unfortunately, Sooty and the gang have no recollection of their trip to the North Pole and assume thatMr. Slatergave them the presents. In this appearance, Father Christmas was played byBrian Blessed.

characters.name: Harry the Robot
characters.description: Harry the Robot with Richard and Sooty Harry the Robotwas created bySootyto helpRichardto clean up the park ahead of an inspection. Harry the Robot then helped to findSoo's missing rabbit,Twinkle. He appeared in the 2011 Christmas stage show at the Garrick Theatre, London, throughout December. He also appeared in Sooty in Space at The Duchess Theatre, London, throughout December and early January.

characters.name: Label
characters.description: Labelwas the Corbett family's dog who was seen in various episodes ofThe Sooty Show,Learn with SootyandSooty & Co.Although it is unconfirmed, it is assumed the dog is now deceased. Label received her name becauseMatthew Corbett's children wanted to call her Lady (possibly after the lead character of the Disney film "Lady and the Tramp" who is also a cocker spaniel) while his wifeSallie Corbettwanted to call her Mabel. Matthew decided to then split the difference and call her Label. This fact is stated in the Learn with Sooty video,A-Z of Animals.

characters.name: Matthew Corbett
characters.description: Matthew Corbett with Sooty outside his house in Lymm Peter Graham Corbett, better known by his stage nameMatthew Corbett, was born March 28th, 1948 in Guiseley, West Yorkshire. He is best known as an English television personality onThe Sooty Showand latterlySooty & Co.He took overSootyfrom his fatherHarry Corbettin 1976, and retired in 1998. Corbett was born in Guiseley, West Riding of Yorkshire. In the late 1960s or early 1970s, he had to choose another stage name, as there was already another Peter Corbett registered. He kept his surname, but when choosing his new first name he was told it must be a name that is long, and so he chose the name of Matthew; for television purposes he has always remained as Matthew Corbett.

characters.name: Matthew Corbett

characters.name: Minor Characters in Sooty & Co.
characters.description: This page is for minor characters that appeared in theSooty & Co.series. The Black Knightappears in Matthew's dream after he falls asleep watching the jousting. The Black Knight challenges Matthew to a jousting competition for Soo's honour. Matthew is somehow persuaded to accept the challenge and the Black Knight wins the joust by knocking Matthew at his horse. This somewhat angers Sooty who challenges the Black Knight himself and ultimately wins, leaving the Black Knight crying for his mummy. The Black Knight is actually the jouster that Matthew is watching when he falls asleep. The Black Knight (and the unnamed jouster) was played by stuntmanC C Smiff. Merlinis a magician who appears in Matthew's dream when he falls asleep watching the jousting at Camelot theme park. Merlin magically appears as Sooty is about to take on the Black Knight. Merlin attempts to magic Sooty a horse, but instead magics Sooty's campervan. He then watches as Sooty takes on the Black Knight. Merlin was played byStuart Loughland.

characters.description: This page is forminor characters that appeared in the 2011 series ofSooty. Bob the Security Guardwas constantly chasing afterRichardand the gang, who thought he wanted to throw them out of the theme park ,but it turns out that he was trying to track them down to give Sooty a prize for being the one millionth costumer. He was portrayed byMark Roper. Specials:

characters.name: Minor characters in Sooty Heights
characters.description: This page is forminor characters that appeared in theSooty Heightsseries. Mr. Whalleyowns a hardware store and is also a governor who dislikes dogs. He was played byLarry Dann. Mrs. Frumptonis a hotel inspector from P.O.S.H. (Particularly Outstanding Hotels). She was played byHelen Lederer.

characters.name: Minor characters in The Sooty Show
characters.description: The Geniewas featured inSooty's Magic Lamp. He is somewhat cranky. He talks in rhyme and will grant wishes. Each time he grants a wish, his hair changes colour. He was portrayed byBernard Bresslaw. The photographerwas featured inSuper Starwhere he was trying to get a photo and an interview with Sweep. He finally got into an argument with Matthew, resulting in Matthew getting a black eye. It is unknown who played him. Auntie GertrudeisMatthew's aunt. InStar Gazingit was revealed she was staying in the Sooty House for a while and she was working as an astronomer. She is sometimes calledAuntie Gertieeven though she doesn't like the name. She was played byJune Whitfield.
